title: CI/CD Pipeline Generation
description: Procedural PHP scripts that dynamically generate GitLab CI YAML pipelines for package, appsec, profiler, shared, and tracer configurations. Each generator includes generate-common.php and emits YAML via PHP interpolation.

modules.name: generate-common.php
modules.role: Shared foundation — included by ALL generators
functions: unset_dd_runner_env_vars(): void — emits YAML to unset DD_SERVICE/DD_ENV/DD_TAGS/DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED
dockerhub_login(): void — emits YAML shell step calling .gitlab/dockerhub-login.sh
windows_git_setup(): void — emits PowerShell: kill containers, clean workspace, git clone + submodule init
windows_git_setup_with_packages(): void — preserves artifact packages dir, then calls windows_git_setup()
yaml_anchors_emitted: default: retry block (max:2, on runner/scheduler/timeout failures)
.services: test-agent, request-replayer, httpbin-integration, mysql, elasticsearch2/7, zookeeper, kafka, redis, memcache, amqp, mongodb, sqlsrv, googlespanner

modules.name: generate-package.php
modules.role: Main package pipeline — stages: prepare, profiler, appsec, tracing, packaging, benchmarks, gate, notify, verify, shared-pipeline, pre-release, release
data_variables: $build_platforms: array[4] — {triplet, image_template, arch, host_os, targets[]}; covers alpine-musl (amd64/arm64) + centos-7-gnu (amd64/arm64)
$windows_build_platforms: array[1] — Windows MSVC amd64, target: dbgsym.tar.gz
jobs_generated: 'prepare code': composer update + make generate → artifacts VERSION, src/bridge/_generated*.php
'cache cargo deps: [arch, triplet]' (loop $build_platforms): cargo fetch --target TRIPLET; cache keyed by Cargo.lock
update_central_configurations_version_range_v2: updates central config for dd-trace-php language
package-oci: needs 'package loader: [arch]' for each arch
loop_patterns: foreach $build_platforms x $profiler_minor_major_targets → compile extension jobs (inferred from offset 200+)

modules.name: generate-appsec.php
data_variables: $ecrLoginSnippet: heredoc — AWS CLI install + STS assume-role + ECR docker login
template_jobs: .appsec_test: base template; tags arch:${ARCH}; interruptible; before_script: unset_dd_runner_env_vars() + apt install clang-tidy-17 + mkdir appsec/build; cache: boost-cache
.docker_push_job: stage docker-build; image docker:29.4.0-noble; before_script: ECR login + dockerhub_login() + apt install openjdk-17
.appsec_integration_tests: stage test; docker-in-docker:amd64; Gradle-based; caches appsec int test cache; artifacts: JUnit XML
concrete_jobs: 'test appsec extension': extends .appsec_test; matrix PHP_MAJOR_MINOR x ARCH x {debug, debug-zts, debug-zts-asan}; cmake -DDD_APPSEC_TESTING=ON + make xtest
'appsec integration tests': extends .appsec_integration_tests; Gradle targets test7.0..test8.5 (release+zts+musl variants)
'appsec integration tests (ssi)': extends .appsec_integration_tests; target test8.3-release-ssi
'appsec integration tests (helper-rust)': extends .appsec_integration_tests; HELPER_RUST_FLAG=-PuseHelperRust; selected PHP versions
'helper-rust build and test': docker-in-docker; Gradle testHelperRust
'helper-rust code coverage': docker-in-docker; Gradle coverageHelperRust; uploads LCOV to codecov + Datadog
'helper-rust integration coverage': Gradle buildHelperRustWithCoverage + test8.3-debug + generateHelperRustIntegrationCoverage; uploads LCOV
'appsec code coverage': extends .appsec_test; cmake -DDD_APPSEC_ENABLE_COVERAGE=ON; llvm-profdata/cov export → codecov + datadog-ci
'push appsec images': extends .docker_push_job; manual; Gradle pushAll; parallel ARCH amd64/arm64
'push appsec docker images multiarch': extends .docker_push_job; needs push appsec images; Gradle pushMultiArch
'appsec lint': extends .appsec_test; cmake + make format tidy (clang-format-17 + clang-tidy-17)
'test appsec helper asan': extends .appsec_test; cmake -DDD_APPSEC_BUILD_EXTENSION=OFF -fsanitize=address,leak; make ddappsec_helper_test
'check libxml2 version': Python script; fetches GNOME GitLab tags API; compares local appsec/third_party/libxml2/VERSION

modules.name: generate-shared.php
modules.role: Shared C components + ZAI pipeline — stages: build, test
concrete_jobs: 'C components ASAN': parallel images centos-7/alpine/bookworm-7; cmake ASAN toolchain + make test
'C components UBSAN': bookworm-7; cmake ubsan.cmake toolchain + make test
'Build & Test Tea': parallel matrix $all_minor_major_targets x $switch_php_versions; build-tea.sh + make test; artifacts: tmp/tea
'Configuration Consistency': checks metadata/supported-configurations.json vs generated output
'Zend Abstract Interface Tests: [ver, variant]' (loop): extends .tea_test; needs Build & Test Tea artifact; switch-php + cmake ZAI build + make test
'ZAI Shared Tests: [7.4|8.0]': shared-ext image; RUN_SHARED_EXTS_TESTS=1
'Extension Tea Tests: [ver, variant]' (loop): extends .tea_test; make install ddtrace.so; cmake tests/tea
loop_patterns: foreach $all_minor_major_targets x $switch_php_versions → ZAI tests (ASAN toolchain if debug-zts-asan, UBSAN if debug + >=7.4)
template_jobs: .tea_test: tags arch:amd64; interruptible; after_script: copy LastTest.log + silent-upload-junit-to-datadog.sh; artifacts: JUnit XML

modules.name: generate-profiler.php
concrete_jobs: 'profiling tests': parallel matrix $profiler_minor_major_targets x {alpine, centos-7} x arch; cargo build --profile profiler-release --all-features; run-tests.php for NTS + ZTS; artifacts: JUnit XML
'clippy NTS': parallel $profiler_minor_major_targets; switch-php nts; cargo clippy -D warnings
'Cargo test': php-8.5_bookworm-7; switch-php nts; cargo test --all-features
modules.notes: Uses $profiler_minor_major_targets (PHP 7.1+). CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/mnt/ramdisk/cargo. Skips JUnit upload on centos-7 (old glibc/OpenSSL incompatible with datadog-ci).

modules.name: generate-tracer.php
data_variables: $services: array — parsed from services file via regex
functions: after_script($execute_dir='.', $has_test_agent=false): void — emits after_script YAML snippet with JUnit upload and test-agent teardown
sidecar_logs(): void — emits sidecar log dump commands
before_script_steps($with_docker_auth=false): void — emits before_script YAML including optional docker auth
agent_httpbin_service(): void — emits service YAML definition for test-agent + httpbin

shared_data_flow: generate-common.php defines PHP version matrix → ALL generators use version anchors in CI YAML
generate-common.php defines $arch_targets → used in parallel matrix jobs across all generators
$asan_minor_major_targets (PHP>=7.4) → controls ASAN test inclusion in appsec and shared pipelines
$windows_minor_major_targets (PHP>=7.2) → controls Windows build jobs in package pipeline
$service_bind_address — adapts between local dev (0.0.0.0) and GitLab k8s runners (127.0.0.1)
design_patterns: Template Method: base YAML job templates (.appsec_test, .docker_push_job, .tea_test) extended by concrete jobs
Code Generation: PHP as meta-language — each file outputs YAML; loops generate N parallel CI jobs
Shared Library: generate-common.php acts as a utility module with global state (vars) + helper functions
Matrix Expansion: PHP foreach loops unroll into GitLab parallel:matrix YAML entries
important_notes: No OOP classes — entirely procedural PHP scripts acting as YAML generators
PHP echo/heredoc/short-tags <?= ?> used to splice values into YAML output
YAML anchors (&all_minor_major_targets, &arch_targets etc.) defined in generate-common.php output are reused across YAML via *alias references
generate-package.php is the largest (~1000+ lines) — covers the full release pipeline including one-pipeline integration, OCI packaging, Windows builds
AWS ECR login via STS assume-role in generate-appsec.php; vault used for secrets (codecov token, Datadog API key)
PHP version ABI map: 7.0=20151012 through 8.5=20250925 — used to name compiled extension artifacts
